- [Truth & Beauty - OECD BLI Design](https://truth-and-beauty.net/projects/oecd-better-life-index) -- Design philosophy: "hierarchy of information that presents the most important values at a glance"
- [Astro Academic Project Template](https://github.com/RomanHauksson/academic-project-astro-template) -- MDX + components for research papers
- [Astro Markdown Content](https://docs.astro.build/en/guides/markdown-content/) -- MDX integration, remark/rehype plugin configuration, `getHeadings()` API
- [rehype-citation](https://www.timlrx.com/blog/streamlining-citations-in-markdown/) -- Academic citation plugin for rehype/Astro pipeline
- [remark-gfm](https://github.com/remarkjs/remark-gfm) -- GitHub Flavored Markdown with footnote support
- [Astro TOC Implementation](https://noahflk.com/blog/astro-table-of-contents) -- Building auto-generated TOC with IntersectionObserver
- [Beyond GDP Database (Nature, 2024)](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41597-024-04006-4) -- Comprehensive Beyond-GDP database, WISE framework convergence
- [Lancet Beyond GDP Framework (2024)](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2542519624001475) -- Review of measurement frameworks, conceptual grounding

---

*Researched: 2026-04-21*
*Supersedes: v1.0 feature research (movement platform table stakes)*

content.text:
Here's the full requirements list:

## Milestone v1.1 Requirements

### Foundation & Data Pipeline
- [ ] **DATA-01**: Shared MIND score library extracted from Zone Zero with calcScore(), getBindingConstraint(), normalize() functions
- [ ] **DATA-02**: Build-time World Bank API fetch for 16 indicators across 217 countries with committed JSON baseline
- [ ] **DATA-03**: Data normalization pipeline transforming raw indicators to 0-100 MIND dimension scores
- [ ] **DATA-04**: Indicator methodology transparency panel showing which World Bank indicators feed each MIND dimension

### Whitepaper
- [ ] **PAPER-01**: Structured MDX whitepaper page on /whitepaper route with title, abstract, sections, conclusion
- [ ] **PAPER-02**: Sticky TOC sidebar with scroll-spy highlighting via IntersectionObserver and getHeadings()

input.content:
# Requirements: Intelligent Economics

**Defined:** 2026-04-21
**Core Value:** The volunteer conversion pipeline must work. Every visitor who wants to join this movement must be captured, welcomed, and given a path to meaningful contribution.

## v1.1 Requirements

Requirements for MIND Intelligence Layer milestone. Each maps to roadmap phases.

### Foundation & Data Pipeline

- [ ] **DATA-01**: Shared MIND score library extracted from Zone Zero with calcScore(), getBindingConstraint(), normalize() functions
- [ ] **DATA-02**: Build-time World Bank API fetch for 16 indicators across 217 countries with committed JSON baseline
- [ ] **DATA-03**: Data normalization pipeline transforming raw indicators to 0-100 MIND dimension scores
- [ ] **DATA-04**: Indicator methodology transparency panel showing which World Bank indicators feed each MIND dimension

### Whitepaper

- [ ] **PAPER-01**: Structured MDX whitepaper page on /whitepaper route with title, abstract, sections, conclusion
- [ ] **PAPER-02**: Sticky TOC sidebar with scroll-spy highlighting via IntersectionObserver and getHeadings()
- [ ] **PAPER-03**: Math equation rendering via KaTeX (build-time, zero client JS) for MIND formula
- [ ] **PAPER-04**: Citation and footnote formatting with remark-gfm for academic references
- [ ] **PAPER-05**: Print-friendly CSS (@media print) for PDF-quality output
- [ ] **PAPER-06**: Social sharing meta tags (og:title, og:description, og:image) for whitepaper

### Dashboard Core

- [ ] **DASH-01**: Country-level MIND score radar chart showing M/I/N/D dimension balance for any country
- [ ] **DASH-02**: Bar chart comparing MIND dimensions across selected countries
- [ ] **DASH-03**: Country search/selection with autocomplete for 217 countries
- [ ] **DASH-04**: Binding constraint identification callout per country
- [ ] **DASH-05**: Data source attribution with vintage year on every chart
- [ ] **DASH-06**: Mobile-responsive charts with simplified mobile layout
- [ ] **DASH-07**: Progressive enhancement — server-rendered ranking table before JS hydration

### Dashboard Advanced

- [ ] **DASH-08**: Side-by-side comparison of 2-4 countries with overlaid radar charts
- [ ] **DASH-09**: Zone Zero integration — "See this country in simulator" pre-loads real MIND scores via URL params
- [ ] **DASH-10**: Bookmarkable dashboard URLs with country/view state encoding

### Multi-Scale

- [ ] **SCALE-01**: 5-10 curated city profiles with manually assembled MIND indicator data
- [ ] **SCALE-02**: Firm self-assessment tool with user-input sliders (Zone Zero pattern reuse)
- [ ] **SCALE-03**: Scale navigation UI (firm -> city -> country -> global) with breadcrumb or tabs

### Cross-Linking & Polish

- [ ] **LINK-01**: MDX inline mini-chart components embedded in whitepaper prose
- [ ] **LINK-02**: Bidirectional navigation between whitepaper and dashboard
- [ ] **AGG-01**: Hierarchical aggregation visualization showing MIND score composition across scales
- [ ] **NAV-01**: Site navigation updated with Whitepaper and Dashboard links
- [ ] **A11Y-01**: Accessibility audit — screen reader alternatives for all charts, aria-labels
- [ ] **PERF-01**: Lighthouse verification — dashboard page mobile >= 75, desktop >= 90

## v1.2 Requirements

Deferred to future release. Tracked but not in current roadmap.

### Dashboard Enhancements

- **DASH-11**: Time-series animation (Gapminder-style) showing MIND score changes over 10-20 years
- **DASH-12**: Choropleth world map colored by MIND score
- **DASH-13**: Custom indicator selection for researchers

### Data Expansion

- **DATA-05**: Automated city-level data from Census ACS and international equivalents
- **DATA-06**: Automated firm-level data from SEC EDGAR and financial APIs

## Out of Scope

Explicitly excluded. Documented to prevent scope creep.

| Feature | Reason |
|---------|--------|
| Real-time data fetching on page load | World Bank data updates annually — build-time fetch is sufficient |
| User accounts / saved preferences | URL state encoding is sufficient, no backend exists |
| Custom indicator selection | Undermines opinionated MIND methodology |
| Automated city/firm data from APIs | Free public APIs don't provide MIND-relevant data at these scales |
| PDF generation via Puppeteer | CSS @media print is sufficient for v1.1 |
| Academic peer review system | Moderation overhead, use GitHub Discussions instead |
| Real-time collaboration on data | Use Google Sheets for collaborative entry, import at build time |

## Traceability

Which phases cover which requirements. Updated during roadmap creation.

| Requirement | Phase | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| DATA-01 | — | Pending |
| DATA-02 | — | Pending |
| DATA-03 | — | Pending |
| DATA-04 | — | Pending |
| PAPER-01 | — | Pending |
| PAPER-02 | — | Pending |
| PAPER-03 | — | Pending |
| PAPER-04 | — | Pending |
| PAPER-05 | — | Pending |
| PAPER-06 | — | Pending |
| DASH-01 | — | Pending |
| DASH-02 | — | Pending |
| DASH-03 | — | Pending |
| DASH-04 | — | Pending |
| DASH-05 | — | Pending |
| DASH-06 | — | Pending |
| DASH-07 | — | Pending |
| DASH-08 | — | Pending |
| DASH-09 | — | Pending |
| DASH-10 | — | Pending |
| SCALE-01 | — | Pending |
| SCALE-02 | — | Pending |
| SCALE-03 | — | Pending |
| LINK-01 | — | Pending |
| LINK-02 | — | Pending |
| AGG-01 | — | Pending |
| NAV-01 | — | Pending |
| A11Y-01 | — | Pending |
| PERF-01 | — | Pending |

**Coverage:**
- v1.1 requirements: 29 total
- Mapped to phases: 0
- Unmapped: 29

input.prompt:
<planning_context>
<files_to_read>
- .planning/PROJECT.md
- .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md
- .planning/research/SUMMARY.md
- .planning/config.json
- .planning/MILESTONES.md
</files_to_read>

</planning_context>

<instructions>
Create roadmap for milestone v1.1 MIND Intelligence Layer:
1. Continue phase numbering from the previous milestone's last phase number. v1.0 ended at Phase 6, so v1.1 starts at Phase 7.
2. Derive phases from THIS MILESTONE's requirements only (29 requirements: DATA-01 through PERF-01)
3. Map every requirement to exactly one phase
4. Derive 2-5 success criteria per phase (observable user behaviors)
5. Validate 100% coverage
6. Write files immediately (ROADMAP.md, STATE.md, update REQUIREMENTS.md traceability)
7. Return ROADMAP CREATED with summary

Key research-informed phase ordering:
- Phase 1: Shared foundation + data pipeline (DATA-01, DATA-02, DATA-03) — everything depends on this
- Phase 2: Whitepaper (PAPER-01 through PAPER-06) — independent of dashboard, defines aggregation methodology
- Phase 3: Country dashboard core (DASH-01 through DASH-07, DATA-04) — depends on data pipeline
- Phase 4: Dashboard advanced + Zone Zero integration (DASH-08, DASH-09, DASH-10) — depends on dashboard core
- Phase 5: Multi-scale + cross-linking (SCALE-01, SCALE-02, SCALE-03, LINK-01, LINK-02) — requires both whitepaper and dashboard
- Phase 6: Aggregation visualization + polish (AGG-01, NAV-01, A11Y-01, PERF-01) — requires all scales

The research specifically notes that Phases 2 and 3 can run in parallel after Phase 1.

Write files first, then return.
</instructions>

## ROADMAP CREATED

**Files written:**

- `/Users/scandal/ai/intelligenteconomics/.planning/STATE.md`

**Updated:**
- `/Users/scandal/ai/intelligenteconomics/.planning/REQUIREMENTS.md` (traceability section)

### Summary

**Phases:** 6 (Phases 7-12, continuing from v1.0)
**Granularity:** Standard
**Coverage:** 29/29 requirements mapped

| Phase | Goal | Requirements |
|-------|------|--------------|
| 7 - Shared Foundation + Data Pipeline | Single source of truth for MIND score calculation with real World Bank data fetched and committed | DATA-01, DATA-02, DATA-03 |
| 8 - Whitepaper | Academically credible MIND framework whitepaper at /whitepaper with TOC, math, print CSS, social meta | PAPER-01, PAPER-02, PAPER-03, PAPER-04, PAPER-05, PAPER-06 |
| 9 - Country Dashboard Core | Interactive country-level MIND dashboard at /dashboard with charts for 217 countries | DASH-01, DASH-02, DASH-03, DASH-04, DASH-05, DASH-06, DASH-07, DATA-04 |
| 10 - Dashboard Advanced | Country comparison, Zone Zero integration, bookmarkable URLs | DASH-08, DASH-09, DASH-10 |
| 11 - Multi-Scale + Cross-Linking | City profiles, firm self-assessment, scale navigation, whitepaper-dashboard bidirectional links | SCALE-01, SCALE-02, SCALE-03, LINK-01, LINK-02 |
| 12 - Aggregation Visualization + Polish | Hierarchical composition tree, nav updates, accessibility audit, Lighthouse verification | AGG-01, NAV-01, A11Y-01, PERF-01 |

### Success Criteria Preview

**Phase 7: Shared Foundation + Data Pipeline**
1. Zone Zero simulator imports calcScore() from the shared library and produces identical scores to before the extraction
2. Running `npm run fetch-data` produces a committed JSON file with normalized 0-100 MIND scores for 217 countries
3. The site builds successfully with no network access (using committed JSON baseline)
4. Each country record includes source, year, and accessedDate metadata fields

**Phase 8: Whitepaper**
1. Visiting /whitepaper displays a structured document with title, abstract, numbered sections, and conclusion
2. A sticky sidebar TOC highlights the current section as the user scrolls
3. The MIND formula renders as properly typeset math equations
4. Printing the whitepaper produces clean PDF-quality output
5. Sharing the /whitepaper URL on social media displays a rich preview

**Phase 9: Country Dashboard Core**
1. Visiting /dashboard shows a searchable interface filtering 217 countries
2. Selecting a country shows a radar chart with binding constraint callout
3. Bar chart comparing MIND dimensions across selected countries
4. Every chart displays data source attribution and vintage year
5. Mobile-responsive layout with server-rendered ranking table as progressive enhancement

**Phase 10: Dashboard Advanced**
1. 2-4 country side-by-side comparison with overlaid radar charts
2. "See this country in simulator" opens Zone Zero pre-loaded with real MIND scores
3. Browser URL encodes dashboard state and restoring it from a pasted URL works

**Phase 11: Multi-Scale + Cross-Linking**
1. Scale navigation UI with 5-10 curated city profiles
2. Firm-level MIND self-assessment with sliders showing score and binding constraint
3. Whitepaper contains inline mini-charts and bidirectional links to dashboard

**Phase 12: Aggregation Visualization + Polish**
1. Hierarchical visualization showing MIND score composition across scales
2. Site navigation includes Whitepaper and Dashboard links on every page
3. All charts have screen reader alternatives passing WCAG 2.1 AA
4. Dashboard page scores Lighthouse >= 90 desktop, >= 75 mobile

### Parallel Execution Note

Phases 8 and 9 can run in parallel after Phase 7 completes -- they share no dependencies beyond the shared score library. This is noted in the roadmap for execution flexibility.

### Coverage

All 29 v1.1 requirements mapped. No orphans. No duplicates.

### UI Phases

Phases 9, 10, 11, and 12 are annotated with `**UI hint**: yes` for downstream `/gsd:ui-phase` detection.

28	- [ ] **DASH-01**: Country-level MIND score radar chart showing M/I/N/D dimension balance for any country
29	- [ ] **DASH-02**: Bar chart comparing MIND dimensions across selected countries
30	- [ ] **DASH-03**: Country search/selection with autocomplete for 217 countries
31	- [ ] **DASH-04**: Binding constraint identification callout per country
32	- [ ] **DASH-05**: Data source attribution with vintage year on every chart
33	- [ ] **DASH-06**: Mobile-responsive charts with simplified mobile layout
34	- [ ] **DASH-07**: Progressive enhancement — server-rendered ranking table before JS hydration
35	
36	### Dashboard Advanced
37	
38	- [ ] **DASH-08**: Side-by-side comparison of 2-4 countries with overlaid radar charts
39	- [ ] **DASH-09**: Zone Zero integration — "See this country in simulator" pre-loads real MIND scores via URL params
40	- [ ] **DASH-10**: Bookmarkable dashboard URLs with country/view state encoding
41	
42	### Multi-Scale
43	
44	- [ ] **SCALE-01**: 5-10 curated city profiles with manually assembled MIND indicator data
45	- [ ] **SCALE-02**: Firm self-assessment tool with user-input sliders (Zone Zero pattern reuse)
46	- [ ] **SCALE-03**: Scale navigation UI (firm -> city -> country -> global) with breadcrumb or tabs
47	
48	### Cross-Linking & Polish
49	
50	- [ ] **LINK-01**: MDX inline mini-chart components embedded in whitepaper prose
51	- [ ] **LINK-02**: Bidirectional navigation between whitepaper and dashboard
52	- [ ] **AGG-01**: Hierarchical aggregation visualization showing MIND score composition across scales
53	- [ ] **NAV-01**: Site navigation updated with Whitepaper and Dashboard links
54	- [ ] **A11Y-01**: Accessibility audit — screen reader alternatives for all charts, aria-labels
55	- [ ] **PERF-01**: Lighthouse verification — dashboard page mobile >= 75, desktop >= 90
56	
57	## v1.2 Requirements
58	
59	Deferred to future release. Tracked but not in current roadmap.
60	
61	### Dashboard Enhancements
62	
63	- **DASH-11**: Time-series animation (Gapminder-style) showing MIND score changes over 10-20 years
64	- **DASH-12**: Choropleth world map colored by MIND score
65	- **DASH-13**: Custom indicator selection for researchers
66	
67	### Data Expansion
68	
69	- **DATA-05**: Automated city-level data from Census ACS and international equivalents
70	- **DATA-06**: Automated firm-level data from SEC EDGAR and financial APIs
71	
72	## Out of Scope
73	
74	Explicitly excluded. Documented to prevent scope creep.
75	
76	| Feature | Reason |
77	|---------|--------|
78	| Real-time data fetching on page load | World Bank data updates annually — build-time fetch is sufficient |
79	| User accounts / saved preferences | URL state encoding is sufficient, no backend exists |
80	| Custom indicator selection | Undermines opinionated MIND methodology |
81	| Automated city/firm data from APIs | Free public APIs don't provide MIND-relevant data at these scales |
82	| PDF generation via Puppeteer | CSS @media print is sufficient for v1.1 |
83	| Academic peer review system | Moderation overhead, use GitHub Discussions instead |
84	| Real-time collaboration on data | Use Google Sheets for collaborative entry, import at build time |
85	
86	## Traceability

24	### v1.1 MIND Intelligence Layer (In Progress)
25	
26	**Milestone Goal:** Give the MIND framework intellectual credibility with a public whitepaper and real-world proof via an interactive multi-scale dashboard.
27	
28	- [ ] **Phase 7: Shared Foundation + Data Pipeline** - Extract MIND score library, build World Bank data pipeline, establish data normalization
29	- [ ] **Phase 8: Whitepaper** - Publishable HTML whitepaper on /whitepaper route with academic formatting and aggregation methodology
30	- [ ] **Phase 9: Country Dashboard Core** - Interactive country-level MIND dashboard on /dashboard with radar/bar charts for 217 countries
31	- [ ] **Phase 10: Dashboard Advanced** - Country comparison, Zone Zero integration, and bookmarkable URLs
32	- [ ] **Phase 11: Multi-Scale + Cross-Linking** - City profiles, firm self-assessment, scale navigation, and whitepaper-dashboard integration
33	- [ ] **Phase 12: Aggregation Visualization + Polish** - Hierarchical MIND score composition tree, nav updates, accessibility audit, performance verification
34	
35	**Note:** Phases 8 and 9 can run in parallel after Phase 7 -- they share no dependencies beyond the shared score library.
36	
37	## Phase Details
38	
39	### Phase 7: Shared Foundation + Data Pipeline
40	**Goal**: A single source of truth for MIND score calculation exists and real World Bank data is fetched, normalized, and committed as a build-time baseline
41	**Depends on**: Phase 6 (v1.0 complete)
42	**Requirements**: DATA-01, DATA-02, DATA-03
43	**Success Criteria** (what must be TRUE):
44	  1. Zone Zero simulator imports calcScore() from the shared library and produces identical scores to before the extraction
45	  2. Running `npm run fetch-data` produces a committed JSON file containing normalized 0-100 MIND dimension scores for 217 countries
46	  3. The site builds successfully with no network access (using the committed JSON baseline)
47	  4. Each country record includes source, year, and accessedDate metadata fields
48	**Plans**: TBD
49	
50	### Phase 8: Whitepaper
51	**Goal**: Visitors can read a structured, academically credible MIND framework whitepaper on the site and share it as a standalone URL
52	**Depends on**: Phase 7 (shared MIND score library for equation consistency)
53	**Requirements**: PAPER-01, PAPER-02, PAPER-03, PAPER-04, PAPER-05, PAPER-06
54	**Success Criteria** (what must be TRUE):
55	  1. Visiting /whitepaper displays a structured document with title, abstract, numbered sections, and conclusion
56	  2. A sticky sidebar TOC highlights the current section as the user scrolls through the whitepaper
57	  3. The MIND formula renders as properly typeset math equations (not plain text or images)
58	  4. Printing the whitepaper page produces clean, readable PDF-quality output without navigation chrome or broken layout
59	  5. Sharing the /whitepaper URL on social media displays a rich preview with title, description, and image
60	**Plans**: TBD
61	
62	### Phase 9: Country Dashboard Core
63	**Goal**: Policy practitioners can explore MIND scores for any country through interactive charts backed by real World Bank data
64	**Depends on**: Phase 7 (data pipeline and shared score library)
65	**Requirements**: DASH-01, DASH-02, DASH-03, DASH-04, DASH-05, DASH-06, DASH-07, DATA-04
66	**Success Criteria** (what must be TRUE):
67	  1. Visiting /dashboard shows a searchable interface where typing a country name filters to matching results from 217 countries
68	  2. Selecting a country displays a radar chart showing M/I/N/D dimension balance and a callout identifying the binding constraint
69	  3. Users can view a bar chart comparing MIND dimensions across multiple selected countries
70	  4. Every chart displays data source attribution and the vintage year of the underlying data
71	  5. On mobile devices, charts reflow to a usable single-column layout; before JavaScript loads, a server-rendered ranking table is visible
72	**Plans**: TBD
73	**UI hint**: yes
74	
75	### Phase 10: Dashboard Advanced
76	**Goal**: Policy practitioners can compare countries side-by-side, jump to the Zone Zero simulator with real data, and bookmark or share their dashboard view
77	**Depends on**: Phase 9 (country dashboard core)
78	**Requirements**: DASH-08, DASH-09, DASH-10
79	**Success Criteria** (what must be TRUE):
80	  1. Users can select 2-4 countries and see overlaid radar charts in a side-by-side comparison view
81	  2. Clicking "See this country in simulator" on the dashboard opens Zone Zero pre-loaded with that country's real MIND scores
82	  3. The browser URL updates as users change countries or views, and pasting that URL restores the exact dashboard state
83	**Plans**: TBD
84	**UI hint**: yes
85	
86	### Phase 11: Multi-Scale + Cross-Linking
87	**Goal**: The MIND framework is demonstrated across firm, city, and country scales, and the whitepaper and dashboard reinforce each other through bidirectional links and embedded visualizations
88	**Depends on**: Phase 8 (whitepaper), Phase 9 (dashboard core)
89	**Requirements**: SCALE-01, SCALE-02, SCALE-03, LINK-01, LINK-02
90	**Success Criteria** (what must be TRUE):
91	  1. The dashboard offers a scale navigation UI (firm / city / country) and displays 5-10 curated city profiles with MIND dimension data
92	  2. Users can complete a firm-level MIND self-assessment using slider inputs and see their firm's MIND score and binding constraint
93	  3. The whitepaper contains inline mini-charts showing real country data within the prose, and links from the whitepaper open the corresponding dashboard view (and vice versa)
94	**Plans**: TBD
95	**UI hint**: yes
96	
97	### Phase 12: Aggregation Visualization + Polish

99	**Depends on**: Phase 11 (all scales and cross-linking in place)

103	  2. The site navigation includes links to Whitepaper and Dashboard accessible from every page
104	  3. All charts have screen reader alternatives (aria-labels, text descriptions) passing WCAG 2.1 AA audit
105	  4. The dashboard page scores Lighthouse >= 90 desktop and >= 75 mobile
106	**Plans**: TBD
107	**UI hint**: yes

# Roadmap: Intelligent Economics

## Milestones

- v1.0 Global Growth Foundation -- Phases 1-6 (shipped 2026-04-21)
- v1.1 MIND Intelligence Layer -- Phases 7-12 (in progress)

## Phases

<details>
<summary>v1.0 Global Growth Foundation (Phases 1-6) -- SHIPPED 2026-04-21</summary>

- [x] Phase 1: Foundation and Deploy (2/2 plans) -- completed 2026-04-21
- [x] Phase 2: Content Migration (4/4 plans) -- completed 2026-04-21
- [x] Phase 3: Conversion Pipeline (3/3 plans) -- completed 2026-04-21
- [x] Phase 4: Analytics and Tracking (1/1 plan) -- completed 2026-04-21
- [x] Phase 5: Performance Optimization (2/2 plans) -- completed 2026-04-21
- [x] Phase 6: Growth Engine (2/2 plans) -- completed 2026-04-21

Full details: [milestones/v1.0-ROADMAP.md](milestones/v1.0-ROADMAP.md)

</details>

### v1.1 MIND Intelligence Layer (In Progress)

**Milestone Goal:** Give the MIND framework intellectual credibility with a public whitepaper and real-world proof via an interactive multi-scale dashboard.

- [ ] **Phase 7: Shared Foundation + Data Pipeline** - Extract MIND score library, build World Bank data pipeline, establish data normalization
- [ ] **Phase 8: Whitepaper** - Publishable HTML whitepaper on /whitepaper route with academic formatting and aggregation methodology
- [ ] **Phase 9: Country Dashboard Core** - Interactive country-level MIND dashboard on /dashboard with radar/bar charts for 217 countries
- [ ] **Phase 10: Dashboard Advanced** - Country comparison, Zone Zero integration, and bookmarkable URLs
- [ ] **Phase 11: Multi-Scale + Cross-Linking** - City profiles, firm self-assessment, scale navigation, and whitepaper-dashboard integration
- [ ] **Phase 12: Aggregation Visualization + Polish** - Hierarchical MIND score composition tree, nav updates, accessibility audit, performance verification

**Note:** Phases 8 and 9 can run in parallel after Phase 7 -- they share no dependencies beyond the shared score library.

## Phase Details

### Phase 7: Shared Foundation + Data Pipeline
**Goal**: A single source of truth for MIND score calculation exists and real World Bank data is fetched, normalized, and committed as a build-time baseline
**Depends on**: Phase 6 (v1.0 complete)
**Requirements**: DATA-01, DATA-02, DATA-03
**Success Criteria** (what must be TRUE):
  1. Zone Zero simulator imports calcScore() from the shared library and produces identical scores to before the extraction
  2. Running `npm run fetch-data` produces a committed JSON file containing normalized 0-100 MIND dimension scores for 217 countries
  3. The site builds successfully with no network access (using the committed JSON baseline)
  4. Each country record includes source, year, and accessedDate metadata fields
**Plans**: TBD

### Phase 8: Whitepaper
**Goal**: Visitors can read a structured, academically credible MIND framework whitepaper on the site and share it as a standalone URL
**Depends on**: Phase 7 (shared MIND score library for equation consistency)
**Requirements**: PAPER-01, PAPER-02, PAPER-03, PAPER-04, PAPER-05, PAPER-06
**Success Criteria** (what must be TRUE):
  1. Visiting /whitepaper displays a structured document with title, abstract, numbered sections, and conclusion
  2. A sticky sidebar TOC highlights the current section as the user scrolls through the whitepaper
  3. The MIND formula renders as properly typeset math equations (not plain text or images)
  4. Printing the whitepaper page produces clean, readable PDF-quality output without navigation chrome or broken layout
  5. Sharing the /whitepaper URL on social media displays a rich preview with title, description, and image
**Plans**: TBD

### Phase 9: Country Dashboard Core
**Goal**: Policy practitioners can explore MIND scores for any country through interactive charts backed by real World Bank data
**Depends on**: Phase 7 (data pipeline and shared score library)
**Requirements**: DASH-01, DASH-02, DASH-03, DASH-04, DASH-05, DASH-06, DASH-07, DATA-04
**Success Criteria** (what must be TRUE):
  1. Visiting /dashboard shows a searchable interface where typing a country name filters to matching results from 217 countries
  2. Selecting a country displays a radar chart showing M/I/N/D dimension balance and a callout identifying the binding constraint
  3. Users can view a bar chart comparing MIND dimensions across multiple selected countries
  4. Every chart displays data source attribution and the vintage year of the underlying data
  5. On mobile devices, charts reflow to a usable single-column layout; before JavaScript loads, a server-rendered ranking table is visible
**Plans**: TBD
**UI hint**: yes

### Phase 10: Dashboard Advanced
**Goal**: Policy practitioners can compare countries side-by-side, jump to the Zone Zero simulator with real data, and bookmark or share their dashboard view
**Depends on**: Phase 9 (country dashboard core)
**Requirements**: DASH-08, DASH-09, DASH-10
**Success Criteria** (what must be TRUE):
  1. Users can select 2-4 countries and see overlaid radar charts in a side-by-side comparison view
  2. Clicking "See this country in simulator" on the dashboard opens Zone Zero pre-loaded with that country's real MIND scores
  3. The browser URL updates as users change countries or views, and pasting that URL restores the exact dashboard state
**Plans**: TBD
**UI hint**: yes

### Phase 11: Multi-Scale + Cross-Linking
**Goal**: The MIND framework is demonstrated across firm, city, and country scales, and the whitepaper and dashboard reinforce each other through bidirectional links and embedded visualizations
**Depends on**: Phase 8 (whitepaper), Phase 9 (dashboard core)
**Requirements**: SCALE-01, SCALE-02, SCALE-03, LINK-01, LINK-02
**Success Criteria** (what must be TRUE):
  1. The dashboard offers a scale navigation UI (firm / city / country) and displays 5-10 curated city profiles with MIND dimension data
  2. Users can complete a firm-level MIND self-assessment using slider inputs and see their firm's MIND score and binding constraint
  3. The whitepaper contains inline mini-charts showing real country data within the prose, and links from the whitepaper open the corresponding dashboard view (and vice versa)
**Plans**: TBD
**UI hint**: yes

### Phase 12: Aggregation Visualization + Polish
**Goal**: The site demonstrates how MIND scores compose across scales, navigation includes the new sections, all charts are accessible, and performance targets are met
**Depends on**: Phase 11 (all scales and cross-linking in place)
**Requirements**: AGG-01, NAV-01, A11Y-01, PERF-01
**Success Criteria** (what must be TRUE):
  1. A hierarchical visualization shows how MIND scores compose upward from firm to city to country to global scale
  2. The site navigation includes links to Whitepaper and Dashboard accessible from every page
  3. All charts have screen reader alternatives (aria-labels, text descriptions) passing WCAG 2.1 AA audit
  4. The dashboard page scores Lighthouse >= 90 desktop and >= 75 mobile
**Plans**: TBD
**UI hint**: yes

## Progress

**Execution Order:**
Phases 8 and 9 can run in parallel after Phase 7. All other phases are sequential.
7 -> 8 (parallel with 9) -> 9 (parallel with 8) -> 10 -> 11 -> 12

| Phase | Milestone | Plans Complete | Status | Completed |
|-------|-----------|----------------|--------|-----------|
| 1. Foundation and Deploy | v1.0 | 2/2 | Complete | 2026-04-21 |
| 2. Content Migration | v1.0 | 4/4 | Complete | 2026-04-21 |
| 3. Conversion Pipeline | v1.0 | 3/3 | Complete | 2026-04-21 |
| 4. Analytics and Tracking | v1.0 | 1/1 | Complete | 2026-04-21 |
| 5. Performance Optimization | v1.0 | 2/2 | Complete | 2026-04-21 |
| 6. Growth Engine | v1.0 | 2/2 | Complete | 2026-04-21 |
| 7. Shared Foundation + Data Pipeline | v1.1 | 0/0 | Not started | - |
| 8. Whitepaper | v1.1 | 0/0 | Not started | - |
| 9. Country Dashboard Core | v1.1 | 0/0 | Not started | - |
| 10. Dashboard Advanced | v1.1 | 0/0 | Not started | - |
| 11. Multi-Scale + Cross-Linking | v1.1 | 0/0 | Not started | - |
| 12. Aggregation Visualization + Polish | v1.1 | 0/0 | Not started | - |
